top.title: I was in the room with Trump and heard the low thudding sound of gunfire

top.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war

top.title: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
top.summary: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.

top.title: I brought my husband back for his funeral as a hologram
top.summary: After nearly 60 years of marriage, Pam wanted to honour her husband Bill with a hologram at his funeral.

top.title: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
